summary: Independent verification of all 3 auth flows complete. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All auth flows verified working - login, register, Google OAuth redirect, session persistence, logout. The CURRENT code in preview environment is working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns 200 with healthy status
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials returns user data and session_token
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with wrong password returns 401
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with Google OAuth user (no password) returns 401 NOT 500
Backend: POST /api/auth/register with new user returns user data and session_token
Backend: POST /api/auth/register with existing email returns 400
Backend: GET /api/auth/me with valid token returns user info
Backend: GET /api/auth/me with invalid token returns 401
Backend: GET /api/auth/me without token returns 401
Backend: GET /api/auth/google returns 307 redirect to accounts.google.com
Backend: POST /api/auth/google/callback without code returns 400
Backend: POST /api/auth/google/callback with invalid code returns 401
Backend: POST /api/auth/logout invalidates session token
Backend: Register→Auth/me flow works correctly
Backend: Login→Auth/me flow works correctly
Frontend: Login page loads with email, password inputs and 'Sign in' button
Frontend: Login page has 'Continue with Google' OAuth button
Frontend: Login with valid credentials redirects to /dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Welcome back, Admin!' greeting with toast
Frontend: Session persists after page refresh - stays on /dashboard
Frontend: Registration page loads with Full Name, Email, Password inputs
Frontend: Registration page has 'Continue with Google' OAuth button
Frontend: Registration with new user redirects to /dashboard with 'Account created successfully!' toast
Frontend: 'Continue with Google' button redirects to accounts.google.com (NOT auth.emergentagent.com)
Frontend: OAuth callback without code redirects to /login (error handling works)

email_password_login.frontend_test: Login form submits, redirects to /dashboard, shows 'Welcome back, Admin!'

user_registration.frontend_test: Register form submits, redirects to /dashboard, shows 'Account created successfully!'

google_oauth.frontend_test: 'Continue with Google' button redirects to Google sign-in page
google_oauth.note: Full OAuth flow cannot be tested e2e (requires real Google credentials). Redirect and callback error handling verified.

session_persistence.test: After login, page refresh keeps user on /dashboard with user data displayed

critical_code_review_comments: All auth endpoints working correctly in preview environment
Google OAuth properly configured with direct Google endpoints (accounts.google.com)
Session token format is 'sess_xxx' as expected
bcrypt fix verified - Google OAuth users without password_hash return 401 not 500
Frontend correctly stores session_token in localStorage and sends as Bearer token
seed_data_creation: playwright_test_72208@example.com created during frontend registration test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth verification complete for iteration 12. All 3 auth flows (login, register, Google OAuth) working correctly in preview environment. The user's reported issues on production likely indicate production is running old code. Key test file: /app/backend/tests/test_auth_flows.py. DB is 'test_database' locally.
conclusion: The CURRENT code in the preview environment is working correctly. All 3 auth flows that the user reported as failing are verified working: 1) Email/password login works, 2) User registration works, 3) Google OAuth redirects to accounts.google.com correctly. If production is failing, it's likely running old code that needs to be redeployed.
